2606.23125.title: AI-Empowered UAV-Assisted Backscatter Localization and ISAC for Zero-Energy IoT: A Comprehensive Survey
2606.23125.paper_summary: Zero-energy Internet of Things (IoT) enables passive or near-passive devices to operate on harvested energy rather than batteries. Backscatter communication (BackCom) supports this vision by enabling tags to transmit data via reflection and modulation of incident RF signals, but it suffers from weak reflections, double-path loss, limited coverage, direct-link interference, and dependence on external RF sources. Unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) can mitigate these limitations by acting as mobile carrier emitters, data collectors, relays, aerial receivers, mobile anchors, sensing platforms, and edge-intelligence nodes. Integrated sensing and communication (ISAC) further enables the sharing of wireless resources for data transmission, localization, target sensing, and environmental awareness. This article surveys RF-based AI-empowered UAV-assisted backscatter localization and ISAC for zero-energy IoT. It reviews enabling technologies, presents a structured PRISMA-informed methodology, and develops a unified taxonomy covering network architectures, UAV roles, backscatter modes, RF sources, localization and sensing functions, AI techniques, and performance metrics. It also discusses UAV-assisted BackCom, passive localization, ISAC-enabled UAV-backscatter systems, and AI-driven optimization through comparative tables, quantitative trend analysis, coverage evaluation, and tutorial-style numerical illustrations. Finally, it identifies open challenges and future directions in realistic channel modeling, energy-neutral operation, benchmarking, reproducibility, scalable and trustworthy AI, security, privacy, hardware validation, and integration with RIS, MEC, digital twins, and 6G technologies.
2606.23125.paper_summary_zh: 零能量物聯網（IoT）使被動或近被動設備能夠依賴收集的能量運行，而非電池。反向散射通信（BackCom）通過使標籤能夠通過反射和調製入射射頻信號來傳輸數據，支持這一願景，但它面臨著反射弱、雙路徑損失、覆蓋範圍有限、直接鏈路干擾以及對外部射頻源的依賴等問題。無人機（UAV）可以通過充當移動載波發射器、數據收集器、中繼器、空中接收器、移動錨點、感測平台和邊緣智能節點來減輕這些限制。集成感測與通信（ISAC）進一步促進了無線資源的共享，以進行數據傳輸、定位、目標感測和環境感知。本文調查了基於射頻的人工智能賦能的無人機輔助反向散射定位和零能量物聯網的ISAC。它回顧了促成技術，提出了一種結構化的PRISMA知情方法論，並開發了一個統一的分類法，涵蓋網絡架構、無人機角色、反向散射模式、射頻源、定位和感測功能、人工智能技術以及性能指標。它還通過比較表、定量趨勢分析、覆蓋評估和教程風格的數值示例，討論了無人機輔助的BackCom、被動定位、ISAC支持的無人機反向散射系統以及基於人工智能的優化。最後，它確定了在現實通道建模、能量中立操作、基準測試、可重複性、可擴展和可信的人工智能、安全性、隱私、硬體驗證以及與RIS、MEC、數位雙胞胎和6G技術的整合方面的開放挑戰和未來方向。
2606.23125.author: Ruhul Amin Khalil et.al.
